ddls:
CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert type */,
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the priority level */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was generated */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value associated with the alert (e.g., temperature reading) */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text description of the alert */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the alert (e.g., heating, cooling) */,
  "ackn" INTEGER /* Acknowledgment status of the alert (true/false) */,
  "adate" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was acknowledged */,
  "ackn_user" TEXT /* User who acknowledged the alert */,
  "attr" TEXT /* Additional attributes or metadata associated with the alert */,
  "attachment" TEXT /* File attachment associated with the alert (if any) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the alert (e.g., sensor, manual input, automated system) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the alert */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device or sensor that generated the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been resolved (true/false) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Details on how the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_alert_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_type_id") REFERENCES alert_types ("alert_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_priority_id FOREIGN KEY ("priority_id") REFERENCES alert_priorities ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_types" (
  "alert_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert type */,
  "alert_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert type */,
  "escalation_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if alerts of this type require escalation */,
  "default_timeout" INTEGER /* Default timeout for alerts of this type before escalation */,
  "default_target_user_id" INTEGER /* Default user to escalate alerts of this type to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_level" INTEGER /* Priority level value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visual representation of the priority level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., facility manager, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_acknowledgments" (
  "ackn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each acknowledgment */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert being acknowledged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user acknowledging the alert */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of acknowledgment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments when acknowledging the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ackn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_acknowledgments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_acknowledgments_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., heating, cooling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_tags_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_attributes" (
  "attr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert associated with the attribute */,
  "attr_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "attr_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_attributes_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert associated with the attachment */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the attached file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the attached file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "escalations" (
  "escalation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each escalation rule */,
  "alert_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert type associated with the rule */,
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the priority level associated with the rule */,
  "timeout" INTEGER /* Timeout period before escalating the alert */,
  "target_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target user to escalate the alert to */,
  "escalation_level" TEXT /* Level of escalation (e.g., first, second, final) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("escalation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_escalations_alert_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_type_id") REFERENCES alert_types ("alert_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_escalations_target_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_escalations_priority_id FOREIGN KEY ("priority_id") REFERENCES alert_priorities ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the setting is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., login, logout, alert creation) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who triggered the event */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to trigger the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
